# SECURITY POLICY

## Supportes Versions

Argus is a forward looking project. Only the latest and most current version is supported

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Security conserns can be submitted [_here_](https://github.com/Beatrix-labs/argus/security/advisories/new)  without risk of exposing sensitive infomation. For issue that are low severity or unlikely to see exploitation, public issue are often acceptable.
